creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Tomoaki AOKI from comment #6)

> nvidia-driver is missing a required shared library: libnvidia-tls.so.1:32
> nvidia-driver is missing a required shared library: libXext.so.6:32
> nvidia-driver is missing a required shared library: libX11.so.6:32

I had the same with 470.161.03.1500034_1 on FreeBSD 15.0-CURRENT. 

Nothing missing for nvidia-driver with 470.256.02.1500034_1 from bug 285069.
